title: House 5 candy house — big spook beat brave footsteps
prompt: Multi-shot composition. Continuity from clip 15 closing frame: Sara, Eva and Joe-the-bug stepped softly off the sidewalk to the foot of the candy-wrapper-strewn pathway at @ep15_house5_candy_house. Big-spook-beat brave-footsteps — slow-motion bravery.

Shot 1 (0-4s, low-angle medium-wide, slow dolly push, slow tilt up) — Elements: @Sara, @Eva, @Joe, @ep15_house5_candy_house
@Sara center-left at the foot of the pathway, candy bucket in left hand, right hand softly clasped around @Eva's left hand. @Eva center-right beside Sara, @Joe's leash in right hand, left hand clasped around Sara's right. @Joe softly in front of Eva on the pathway, ears perked. Slow tilt up across the candy house decor — head-sized giant lollipop on candy-cane pole rising at center of the front lawn, oversized friendly cartoon inflatable jack-o-lanterns with smiling candy-corn-toothed grins flanking the path, candy-corn string lights wrapping the porch railing, soft fabric cobweb-tunnel arching over the pathway, friendly oversized inflatable cartoon black cat soft-blurred background with a smiling face. Hold for the spook beat — candy-corn lights twinkle, inflatable cat smiles, cobweb fabric drifts.

Shot 2 (4-7s, medium-close, cut to) — Elements: @Sara, @Eva, @ep15_house5_candy_house
Each girl takes one tiny brave in-place weight-shift forward — feet stay touching the path, slow-motion comic shift, hands still clasped between them. @Eva, gently: "It's TOO scary, Sara..." @Sara, shaky-brave: "But we want CANDY... and we have to FIND Ginger... Lisa SAW her here!"

Shot 3 (7-10s, low-angle medium-wide, slow tilt down to Joe + slow pull back) — Elements: @Sara, @Eva, @Joe, @ep15_house5_candy_house
@Joe gives a small in-place forward lean against his leash, all four paws planted, tail wagging fast — a brave 'let's go' lean. @Sara and @Eva take one more tiny in-place brave weight-shift forward, hands still clasped. @Eva, looking down at @Joe: "Joe is brave, so I'm brave." @Sara: "Joe found something! He's not scared! Let's go find Ginger."

Lighting: soft purple porch light drifting, soft warm candy-corn string lights twinkling, no horror tones, no menacing shadows.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, kid-show.
negativePrompt: mrs patel visible in this clip
cameraStyle: slow dolly push from low-angle medium-wide, slow tilt up across the candy-house decor, one cut to medium-close on the girls, slow tilt down to Joe, capped by a slow pull back
closingFrame: Foot of the candy-wrapper pathway at @ep15_house5_candy_house — @Sara center-left and @Eva center-right with hands clasped between them, both facing forward bravely; @Joe standing softly in front of Eva, leaning against his leash with all four paws planted, ears perked, tail mid-wag; head-sized giant lollipop on candy-cane pole rising at center, inflatable jack-o-lanterns flanking the path, soft fabric cobweb tunnel arching above; soft purple porch light and candy-corn string lights twinkling.
